hero.headline: Build regulated financial systems. Without the wait.
hero.subheading: Most banks spend months getting to a compliant architecture. We get you there in days. AI-powered delivery, built around your regulatory environment and ready for your internal review process.

problem.headline: Regulated fintech delivery is slow, expensive, and risky.
problem.card1Desc: Compliance assessments take weeks when you go through a traditional consultancy. By the time the report lands, the project has moved on.
problem.card2Desc: Architecture and documentation always gets deprioritised until the regulator or auditor asks for it. Then it becomes urgent.
problem.card3Desc: Most consultants understand the technical side or the regulatory side. Very few understand both. Even fewer have shipped a regulated product in the GCC.

howItWorks.headline: Your AI consultancy team. On demand.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us what you are building and where you are stuck. The intake process takes about five minutes. No calls needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your deliverable is generated and delivered as a professional document ready for your internal review process.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Everything we send you is structured to move through your organisation. Board-ready. Audit-ready. No rework required.

deliverables.headline: What would you like to build?
deliverables.card1Desc: You tell us what you are building and which framework applies. We map where you stand and what needs to change. Delivered in 2 hours.
deliverables.card2Desc: Full target state architecture for your regulated platform. Built around your existing stack, not a generic template.
deliverables.card3Desc: The documentation your teams and vendors need to actually execute. Structured so it survives handoffs and governance reviews.
deliverables.card4Desc: A complete PRD for regulated environments. Developers, vendors and compliance all working from the same document.
deliverables.card5Desc: Know exactly what you need before the auditor arrives, not after. Mapped to your specific regulatory environment.
deliverables.card6Desc: A board-ready business case for your blockchain or digital asset initiative. Covers strategic rationale, market opportunity, regulatory pathway, cost model, risk assessment and implementation roadmap. Delivered as PowerPoint, Word, or PDF.

whyStablus.headline: Not a generic AI tool. A regulated systems specialist.
whyStablus.col1Desc: Every framework we work with is UAE and GCC specific. CBUAE, DFSA, ADGM, VARA, SCA. Not adapted from a global template.
whyStablus.col2Desc: Most advisors live on one side of the fence. We sit across both. Architecture design and compliance alignment happen together, not in separate workstreams.
whyStablus.col3Title: You get a service, not a firm
whyStablus.col3Desc: Stablus delivers professional advisory documents. Your internal team decides what to do with them.

alwaysCurrent.headline: Always current
alwaysCurrent.body: Regulatory frameworks across the GCC update constantly. Our system searches CBUAE, DFSA, ADGM, VARA and SCA directly every time a question is asked. You get answers based on what the regulator published today, not what was true six months ago.

services.headline: Services and deliverables
services.subheading: Each deliverable is scoped, priced, and delivered on a fixed timeline. No ambiguity, no scope creep.
services.reg1desc: Governs payment services, stored value facilities, and open banking.
services.reg2desc: Regulates firms operating within the DIFC.
services.reg4desc: Dubai's dedicated crypto and digital asset regulator.
services.reg5desc: Federal regulator for capital markets and crypto assets.
services.d1body: You tell us what you are building and which regulatory framework applies. We map exactly where you stand against those requirements and tell you what needs to change before you can move forward. Delivered in 2 hours.
services.d1i1: Executive summary with compliance posture rating
services.d1i2: Clause-by-clause gap analysis against selected framework
services.d1who: Fintechs preparing for licensing, banks launching new digital products, or any regulated entity facing an upcoming audit or review.
services.d2body: A full target state architecture for your regulated platform. Platform selection, integration design, data flows, security model and infrastructure considerations. Built around your existing stack, not a generic template.
services.d2who: CTOs, engineering leads, and product teams building or restructuring regulated financial technology platforms.
services.d3body: The documentation your internal teams and vendors need to actually execute. Project charter, RACI, risk register and milestone plan. Structured so it survives handoffs and governance reviews.
services.d3i1: Project charter with objectives and scope
services.d3i2: RACI matrix for all key workstreams
services.d3who: Project managers, delivery leads, and PMOs launching regulated technology projects that need structured governance from day one.
services.d4body: A complete PRD written for regulated environments. User stories, compliance requirements and acceptance criteria all in one place. Built so your developers, vendors and compliance team are working from the same document.
services.d4who: Product managers and business analysts working on financial products that must satisfy both user experience goals and regulatory requirements.
services.d5body: A pre-audit control framework mapped to your specific regulatory environment. Know exactly what you need before the auditor arrives, not after.
services.d5i1: Control framework mapped to regulatory requirements
services.d5i2: Evidence checklist for each control area
services.d5i5: Audit preparation timeline and action items
services.d5who: Compliance officers, internal audit teams, and operations leads preparing for regulatory examinations or external audits.
services.d6body: Before any architecture or compliance work begins, someone inside your organisation has to justify the initiative. We generate a full business case built around your specific use case.
services.d6i2: Strategic rationale and alignment with organisational objectives
services.d6i3: Market opportunity and competitive context in the GCC
services.d6i4: Regulatory pathway and licensing requirements (searched live from CBUAE, VARA, DFSA, ADGM, SCA)
services.d6i6: Cost model: build vs buy vs partner
services.d6i8: Implementation roadmap with phases and milestones
services.d6who: Heads of Strategy, Chief Digital Officers, and innovation leads who need board or ExCo approval before committing to a blockchain initiative.

about.headline: The consultant behind the AI.
about.bgBody: The consultant behind Stablus brings over nine years of experience delivering regulated financial systems across the UAE and GCC. This includes direct delivery experience on some of the region's most complex digital asset and blockchain initiatives within major financial institutions.
about.whyBody: Stablus exists because that kind of expertise is too expensive for most organisations to hire full time and too slow to engage through a traditional consultancy. The model here is different. You describe the problem. You get a deliverable. No retainers, no discovery phases that last three months, no junior consultants learning on your project.
about.regBody: Stablus delivers across the full spectrum of GCC regulatory frameworks including CBUAE, DFSA, ADGM, VARA, and SCA. Whether the engagement involves payment service licensing, crypto asset regulation, or open banking compliance, every deliverable is tailored to the specific requirements of the applicable authority.
about.licBody: Stablus Management FZCO is registered in Dubai Silicon Oasis under the Dubai Integrated Economic Zones Authority (DIEZA), License No. 78033. Our licensed activities cover Management Consultancies and Computer Systems Consultancies. All work delivered is professional advisory documentation. Regulatory, legal, and operational decisions remain the sole responsibility of the client organisation.
about.contactBody: For enterprise engagements or to discuss your project directly.

approach.headline: Our approach
approach.subheading: A structured five-phase model that combines AI efficiency with professional accountability.
approach.phase1Desc: Before any design or architecture work begins, we need to understand what you are actually trying to do. This means understanding your business objectives, your regulatory context and the systems you are already running. We identify where blockchain or digital assets genuinely add value and where they do not.
approach.phase1o3: Identification of key risks and constraints
approach.phase2Desc: We translate the discovery findings into a concrete architecture and operating model. Platform choices, integration points, data flows, security requirements and governance structure are all defined here. Nothing is left vague.
approach.phase2o3: Technical architecture aligned with regulatory controls
approach.phase2o4: Structured document ready for expert review
approach.phase3Desc: Delivery oversight means staying close to execution, not just reviewing at milestones. We track progress against the design, flag deviations early and keep vendors and internal teams aligned.
approach.phase3o2: Delivered as a professional document ready for internal review
approach.phase3o3: Document formatted for regulatory or board use
approach.phase4Desc: Once a solution is live, we measure it against the original objectives and the regulatory requirements it was designed to meet. This is where gaps surface and where the operating model gets refined.
approach.phase4o1: Walkthrough of key findings and recommendations
approach.phase4o3: Alignment on next steps and priorities
approach.phase4o4: Clear path to implementation or follow-up engagement
approach.phase5Desc: Every engagement ends with a clear record of what was built, why decisions were made and what the ongoing operational and compliance requirements are. Nothing gets lost in transition.

contact.headline: Get in touch
contact.subheading: For project enquiries, enterprise engagements or a direct conversation about your situation, reach out below. We respond within one business day.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or inquiry

start.headline: Tell us what you're building.
start.subheading: Our AI consultant will scope your project, recommend the right deliverable, and give you a quote. Takes under five minutes.
start.confidentiality: Your conversation and any documents you share are processed in memory only. Nothing is stored, logged, or retained after your session ends. No human reviews your uploaded documents. Documents delivered by Stablus are advisory in nature and do not constitute regulatory approval, legal advice, or certified architectural specifications.
start.regulatory: Regulatory information is sourced directly from regulator websites in real time. Always verify critical requirements with the relevant authority before making licensing or architectural decisions.
start.consentBlock1Body: Your conversation and any documents you share are processed in memory only. Nothing is stored, logged, or retained after your session ends. No human reviews your uploaded documents. Documents delivered by Stablus are advisory in nature and do not constitute regulatory approval, legal advice, or certified architectural specifications.
start.consentBlock2Body: Regulatory information is sourced directly from regulator websites in real time. Always verify critical requirements with the relevant authority before making licensing or architectural decisions.

footer.tagline: AI-powered consultancy for regulated financial systems in the GCC.
footer.license: © 2026 Stablus Management FZCO. Registered in Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE. All deliverables are professional advisory documents and do not constitute regulatory approval or legal advice.

dataHandlingPage.headline: How we handle your data
dataHandlingPage.s1Body: Any document you share through our intake process is loaded into memory for the duration of your session. It is used only to help scope your project. We do not write it to disk, store it in a database, or retain it in any form after your session ends. No Stablus team member views your uploaded documents.
dataHandlingPage.s2Body: Conversations through our intake bot are not stored on Stablus servers. They pass through Anthropic’s API for processing. Anthropic’s data handling policies apply to that processing. We do not retain conversation history.
dataHandlingPage.s3Body: For engagements that require a formal Non-Disclosure Agreement or Data Processing Agreement before sharing sensitive information, contact us at
dataHandlingPage.s3After: We will execute the appropriate agreement before any substantive work begins.
